assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 3)

OOD, disparate impact unassessed, first-contact defendant blind spot. Rural expansion inappropriate without prospective validation.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 3)

Same three issues. Instrument should not be deployed in rural counties without rural validation and equal protection analysis.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 3)

All three issues present. Verdict: critique_wins.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_010 (Ensemble, Run 3)

All assessors agree. Rural expansion without validation inappropriate.

EMPIRICAL TEST SPECIFICATION: 12-month prospective validation in ≥3 rural counties with disparate impact analysis.

empirical_test.condition: 12-month prospective validation in ≥3 rural counties with disparate impact analysis.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: AUROC within 0.05; no significant disparate impact.
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: AUROC maintained but systematic calibration bias.
